title: Incorrect query result
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1) VALUES ('0');
SELECT c1 as r2 FROM t1 WHERE FROM_DAYS(0) NOT IN (SELECT c1 FROM t1); -- actual: {0}， expected: {}
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
{} is expected to return.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
{0} is returned.
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v8.5.1
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: fea86c8e35ad4a86a5e1160701f99493c2ee547c
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-01-16 07:38:34
GoVersion: go1.23.4
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 DATE);
CREATE TABLE t3 (c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, c2 FLOAT);
SELECT c1 FROM t3 WHERE 0 NOT IN (SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c1 = 0);
key_bug_features: FROM_DAYS(0) NOT IN subquery returns incorrect result
